zh.lifeSummary: 當William Montgomery於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾蕾托 庫布利時，他的父親Sir. William de Montgomery42歲，母親Alice de Chaddesdon31歲。他與Philippa of Derbyshire結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1323年9月23日在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William Montgomery was born about 1280, in Little Cubley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir. William de Montgomery, was 42 and his mother, Alice de Chaddesdon, was 31. He married Philippa of Derbyshire. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 23 September 1323, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 44.

William de Montgomery, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice de Chaddesdon, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Philippa of Derbyshire. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1323, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Montgomery(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 리틀 c블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir. William de Montgomery(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Chaddesdon(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Philippa of Derbyshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1323년 9월 23일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Montgomery родился около 1280 г. в местности литл кубли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir. William de Montgomery было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Chaddesdon, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa of Derbyshire. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 23 сентября 1323 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.
